Title: Login / Access Gate
Purpose: Secure entry into the platform with strong identity and trust cues.
Layout: Centered auth card over cinematic dark intelligence background.
Primary Actions: Sign in | Use SSO | Reset password

Title: Dashboard
Purpose: High-level operational awareness for investigations, alerts, and source activity.
Layout: Left nav, top utility bar, central overview grid.
Primary Actions: Open investigation | Review alert | Generate report

Title: Investigations List
Purpose: Case-style management view for active and archived investigations.
Layout: Filter rail + dense table/list + status summary row.
Primary Actions: Create investigation | Open case | Archive case

Title: Investigation Detail
Purpose: Single case workspace for evidence, notes, linked entities, and outputs.
Layout: Summary header + tab system + right action rail.
Primary Actions: Add note | Link entity | Open graph | Generate report

Title: Graph Explorer
Purpose: Primary intelligence correlation environment and emotional center of the product.
Layout: Left filters, central graph canvas, right inspector, sticky top controls.
Primary Actions: Expand node | Inspect relationship | Save view | Pin insight

Title: Entity Profile
Purpose: Structured intelligence object page for people, organizations, locations, and assets.
Layout: Profile header + modular sections + contextual right rail.
Primary Actions: Add alias | Open graph | Attach source | Add note

Title: Source Directory
Purpose: Visibility into available sources, quality, freshness, and ingest state.
Layout: Filter rail + source cards/table + health indicators.
Primary Actions: Open source | Filter by type | Review freshness

Title: Source Detail
Purpose: Detailed view into source metadata, freshness, related entities, and usage.
Layout: Source summary header + metrics + related content sections.
Primary Actions: Open linked entity | View excerpts | Flag source issue

Title: Timeline View
Purpose: Temporal analysis surface for events, correlation, and sequence review.
Layout: Filter bar + interactive timeline + details panel.
Primary Actions: Filter range | Inspect event | Insert in report

Title: Reports List
Purpose: Management surface for all generated and draft reports.
Layout: Summary row + report table + status chips.
Primary Actions: Create report | Open draft | Export PDF

Title: Report Builder
Purpose: Analyst-grade composition surface for polished intelligence output.
Layout: Left outline, center editor, right assets/properties rail.
Primary Actions: Insert chart | Add appendix | Preview export | Publish

Title: Alerts Queue
Purpose: Triage and escalation surface for new and ongoing alert events.
Layout: Priority summary strip + alert list + inspector.
Primary Actions: Review alert | Escalate | Dismiss | Convert to investigation

Title: Analytics
Purpose: Operational analytics for throughput, source utility, and reporting trends.
Layout: Metric strip + chart grid + performance tables.
Primary Actions: Filter date range | Export metrics | Open source breakdown

Title: Settings / Administration
Purpose: Workspace, users, connectors, theme, audit, and governance controls.
Layout: Left settings nav + central form and table modules.
Primary Actions: Invite user | Configure connector | Review audit log
